prompt: Create a realistic close-up photo of a handmade crochet amigurumi doll posed in a modern movie theater lobby, shot from slightly above with shallow depth of field. The doll is a young woman cinema-goer with medium-brown yarn skin, long dark brown micro-braid/twist crochet hair parted down the center, and a plain opaque square covering the face in a matching dark brown tone. She wears exactly 2 visible outfit pieces: a mustard-yellow ribbed crochet long-sleeve top and a black crochet pinafore-style dress with thin black straps. She holds exactly 5 cinema snack items: 1 clear-lidded red iced drink with a black straw in her left hand, 1 cream crochet tray in her right arm, 1 large cream crochet popcorn bucket piled high with yellow-and-white popcorn on the tray, 1 pile of orange crochet nachos in the tray, 1 small clear cup of green jalapeño slices, and 1 small clear cup of red salsa. The background is an indoor multiplex concourse with glossy polished stone floors reflecting blue and purple lights, blurred people, queue stanchions, a red storefront/sign on the left reading “STAPLES,” and a blue illuminated storefront/sign on the right reading “crypto.com.” Use warm indoor lighting, detailed yarn texture, realistic scale, documentary smartphone-photo look, bokeh background, no extra characters in the foreground, no watermark, and keep all objects made of crochet except the clear plastic-looking cup lids and sauce cups. Customize the doll’s hair as dark brown, the top as mustard yellow, the dress as black, and the lobby setting as a modern movie theater lobby.
